definition: Fraction of a UAV's assigned patrol waypoints reached (max wp index / total wp) x100
Run reached its time horizon or all UAVs landed/terminated without process crash
UAV FSM entered LANDING state (reserve-SOC or end-of-mission trigger)
UAV entered LANDING and reached <5 m AGL at <2 m/s ground speed
Vehicle did not crash AND (landed OR route_completion=100% OR still airborne at horizon)
Active event center within camera slant range AND inside angular FOV cone (incl. footprint radius)
UAV entered EVENT_INVESTIGATION targeting a detected HP event and loitered >= min_investigation_s
Event lifetime ended (t >= expiration_time) before any investigation began
HP event still active at run end, never investigated
One accepted PATROL/SEARCH/GLIDE -> THERMAL_EXPLOITATION transition (after entry confirmation)
Cumulative wall-clock sim time a UAV spent in THERMAL_EXPLOITATION
Altitude at exit minus altitude at entry of a THERMAL_EXPLOITATION segment
Integral of aerodynamic propulsion power only (no avionics/payload/comms/compute)
Mean patrol/cruise power x thermalling time: propulsion energy avoided vs powered cruise
State of charge at run end, relative to the (scaled) battery capacity
HP events with >=1 detection / total HP events x100
HP events investigated / total HP events x100
investigation_start_time - first_detect_time for investigated HP events
Accepted FSM state transitions per minute of execution
Transition requests blocked by min-dwell / cooldown guards
Simulated time advanced / wall time elapsed (1.0 = real time)
UAVs that armed / UAVs requested x100 (denominator = requested fleet size)
